s: In 1983, Alfonso Pulido suited up for PIT as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 9.000, WHIP 2.500, SO 1, WAR -0.200.
In 1984, Alfonso Pulido suited up for PIT as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 9.000, WHIP 2.000, SO 2, WAR 0.000.
Changed teams after the previous season (PIT -> NYY).
In 1986, Alfonso Pulido suited up for NYY as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.700, WHIP 1.530, SO 13, WAR -0.400. Notable context: Joined NYY.
